summary: See clues file for full details. 4 tossups, 14 bonuses found.

works.name: General / Key Works
works.description: Analysis from 4 tossups and 14 bonuses. See clues file for detailed breakdown.

clues.clue: According to one account, this artwork was commissioned to replace a Madonna of the Large Eyes icon that had helped its city win a violent battle.
examples: According to one account, this artwork was commissioned to replace a Madonna of the Large Eyes icon that had helped its city win a violent battle.

clues.clue: A gigantic Jesus stands on a mountain and rebukes a black, winged devil in a section of this artwork housed at the Frick.
examples: A gigantic Jesus stands on a mountain and rebukes a black, winged devil in a section of this artwork housed at the Frick.

clues.clue: A section of this artwork features four local saints named Sabinus, Ansanus, Crescentius, and Victor kneeling.
examples: A section of this artwork features four local saints named Sabinus, Ansanus, Crescentius, and Victor kneeling.

clues.clue: When this artwork was dismantled in 1771, its backside lost some of its twenty-six depictions of the Passion of Christ set under a golden sky.
examples: When this artwork was dismantled in 1771, its backside lost some of its twenty-six depictions of the Passion of Christ set under a golden sky.

clues.clue: This artwork's main front panel shows (*) thirty-nine angels and saints surrounding Mary, who holds the baby Jesus on her lap.
examples: This artwork's main front panel shows (*) thirty-nine angels and saints surrounding Mary, who holds the baby Jesus on her lap.

clues.clue: Finished in 1311, this artwork serves as the main altarpiece of the Siena Cathedral.
examples: Finished in 1311, this artwork serves as the main altarpiece of the Siena Cathedral.

clues.clue: This artwork was removed from its original location to make way for a set of sculptures by Francesco di Giorgio, leading Giorgio Vasari unable to ascertain its location.
examples: This artwork was removed from its original location to make way for a set of sculptures by Francesco di Giorgio, leading Giorgio Vasari unable to ascertain its location.

clues.clue: Its largest section unusually features the child martyr Crescentius in a red robe kneeling to the Virgin.
examples: Its largest section unusually features the child martyr Crescentius in a red robe kneeling to the Virgin.

clues.clue: A pure black-bodied Satan tempts Jesus Christ, who towers over several massive cities in a fragment of this masterpiece that is now housed at the Frick.
examples: A pure black-bodied Satan tempts Jesus Christ, who towers over several massive cities in a fragment of this masterpiece that is now housed at the Frick.

clues.clue: A portion of this artwork in which Isaiah and Ezekiel flank a Nativity scene featuring sixteen angels can be found in the U.S.
examples: A portion of this artwork in which Isaiah and Ezekiel flank a Nativity scene featuring sixteen angels can be found in the U.S.

clues.clue: Scenes from the childhood of Christ comprise the front predella of this artwork, while the story of the Passion of Christ is told on numerous panels of its back.
examples: Scenes from the childhood of Christ comprise the front predella of this artwork, while the story of the Passion of Christ is told on numerous panels of its back.
